base_components.name: Announcement Bar
base_components.purpose: Surface a concise operational message, availability note, or institutional highlight above the main navigation.
tailwind_notes: Use compact vertical padding such as py-2
Keep content inside a centered max-width container
Apply sober high-contrast colors derived from the brand palette
content_guidance: Keep copy short and factual
Avoid stacking multiple messages
Do not use the bar for dense promotional copy

base_components.name: Header and Navigation
base_components.purpose: Provide identity, primary navigation, and top-level actions for the website.
tailwind_notes: Use flex alignment with generous horizontal spacing
Preserve clear focus states on all interactive elements
Prefer backdrop blur only when it supports readability
content_guidance: Navigation labels should be explicit and low-ambiguity
CTA label should express the next action clearly

base_components.name: Hero
base_components.purpose: State the main promise, establish authority, and orient the visitor immediately.
tailwind_notes: Use a strong desktop grid and readable stacked mobile layout
Keep the CTA group within the first viewport
Use controlled vertical rhythm between headline, body, and actions
content_guidance: Lead with the core promise, not generic category copy
Avoid vague claims and decorative filler
Use proof or context directly under the promise when available

base_components.name: Section Intro
base_components.purpose: Introduce a section with hierarchy, framing, and optional supporting copy.
tailwind_notes: Keep width constrained for readable line length
Use margin rhythm that creates clear separation from following grids
content_guidance: Use this component to frame content blocks consistently
Avoid repeating the page headline structure verbatim

base_components.name: Feature or Service Cards
base_components.purpose: Present discrete service, feature, or offer items in a scannable grid.
tailwind_notes: Keep card heights visually balanced without forcing equal text length
Use border and shadow tokens from the design system, not ad hoc styles
Prefer responsive grid columns over carousel behavior for primary content
content_guidance: One concept per card
Keep descriptions concrete and free of repetition

base_components.name: Metrics or Proof Strip
base_components.purpose: Show concise proof points, counts, credentials, or confidence signals.
tailwind_notes: Use compact spacing and strong typographic contrast
Support stacking cleanly on mobile
content_guidance: Only include verified proof
Avoid fabricated social proof or unverified performance claims

base_components.name: Testimonial or Social Proof
base_components.purpose: Present trust-building narrative evidence or reputation signals.
tailwind_notes: Keep quotation width readable
Use contrast and spacing instead of decorative quote marks
content_guidance: Only use approved and attributable proof
Avoid implying outcomes beyond what the source supports

base_components.name: FAQ
base_components.purpose: Answer recurring visitor questions in a consistent expandable format.
tailwind_notes: Preserve keyboard accessibility and visible focus
Keep answer spacing generous enough for multi-line reading
content_guidance: Use factual, non-hedged answers
Escalate regulated or approval-gated topics instead of improvising

base_components.name: CTA Band
base_components.purpose: Convert visitor intent with a focused action block near the end of a page.
tailwind_notes: Use high contrast and obvious button hierarchy
Keep padding large enough to feel intentional without overwhelming the page
content_guidance: Give one clear next step
Avoid overloading the CTA block with multiple competing goals

base_components.name: Footer
base_components.purpose: Close the page with utility links, brand information, and secondary actions.
tailwind_notes: Keep visual density lower than the body content
Use clear grouping and generous row spacing on mobile
content_guidance: Do not bury critical actions
Keep compliance and policy references easy to scan
